item.title: Version 0.2.2
item.description:
Voltai Sales OS 0.2.2
- Accounts: searchable, sortable, paginated table with owner filter, deals count and total value - Account hub: link Notion notes, Granola transcripts, and Slack channels to each account - Org page: LinkedIn-style relationship map — add contacts, drag to snap into manager / reports-to / peer, with editable comments - In-app Updates tab with manual update checks - External links now open in your browser; org-chart exports download to Downloads
